name: bi-copilot
description: An expert copilot for analytics delivery: a growing bench of BI skills. Live: groundwork (orientation) and requirements-interrogator (requirements).

plugins.name: bi-copilot
plugins.description: An expert copilot for analytics delivery, built as a growing bench of skills. Live: 'groundwork' (orient on an unfamiliar or inherited estate and build a living knowledge base) and 'requirements-interrogator' (interrogate a solution-shaped request down to the real decision before you build).
